understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level within its step budget, where a level is won only when every goal tile marked '+' is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempt to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in that direction; movement can be blocked by walls or other objects, and some adjacent objects (blocks) are pushable so they can be moved along if pushed into free space. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; control is switched using CLICK on the exact pixel-coordinate position of another selectable, and winning requires arranging all selectables onto all goal tiles at the same time. The movement.*_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and do not guarantee that a move will fail.
